templateMeta.title: Wearable activity tracker
templateMeta.description: Wrist-worn fitness tracker with heart-rate sensing, BLE phone sync, and a companion app.

product.formFactor: Soft TPU strap with 40 mm polycarbonate module
checklistContexts: Give everyday users an affordable way to track steps, heart rate, and sleep without a full smartwatch.
Health-conscious consumers and first-time wearable buyers.
Water resistance IP68, BLE 5.x phone sync, BOM target under $50, skin-safe materials.
Companion iOS/Android app with BLE sync; no medical diagnosis claims in software.
Consumer electronics safety; biocompatibility for skin-contact materials.
Comfortable all-day wear, 7-day battery, trustworthy activity metrics, simple app.
MVP: steps, HR, sleep stages; GPS and SpO2 deferred.
checklistFeatures:
Use case: All-day activity tracking

How to use: Wear on wrist; auto-sync when phone is nearby.

Operating condition: Normal daily motion, indoor/outdoor.

Acceptance criteria: Step count within 10% of reference pedometer on standard walk test.

Metrics: Sync success rate, daily active users.

Use case: Continuous heart rate

How to use: Enable HR in app; wear snug on wrist.

Operating condition: Skin contact required; reduced accuracy with loose fit.

Acceptance criteria: Resting HR MAE ≤ 5 bpm vs chest strap in lab protocol.

Metrics: HR sample completeness, battery impact.
